op_kernel/regnet_custom.cpp:231:40: error: cast between floating and unsigned integer variable is not allowed in aicore function
summary: AscendC AICore kernels reject explicit unsigned-to-float casts in arithmetic. Replace static_cast<float>(uint64_count) style denominators with a float counter helper, then reuse that float value for batch-norm and global-average-pool normalization.
